column10: Meet Natalie, the seasoned leader at Jakata. With 15 years in hairdressing, her knack for crafting unique styles and her left-handed cutting skills define her creative flair.
This is Sarah, the Junior Stylist who effortlessly blends welcoming vibes with natural beauty, crafting stylish hair transformations that reflect her easygoing yet ambitious nature.

Meet Katie, the spirited graduate stylist fuelled by a passion for hair transformations. Her artistic finesse and dedication, coupled with an award-winning touch, make her a captivating asset to Jakata.
Here we have Daisy, a creative and kind Graduate Stylist at Jakata, dedicated to crafting unique hair transformations that boost confidence and exude style.
Jasmine, recently joins us after graduating at Base. She infuses the Jakata team with her vibrant spirit, radiating chattiness, care, and amazing hairdressing skills.
Introducing Lily, the confident and talkative latest addition to the Jakata team, with a passion for challenges, team collaboration, and creating hair transformations that inspire confidence.
